sidebar.folderNameHint: Custom folders are synced to the IMAP server.
sidebar.deleteFolderConfirmText: Delete folder "{name}"? Only empty folders can be deleted right now.
sidebar.selectAccountToView: Select an account to view its folders.
sidebar.addAccountToStart: Add an account to get started.
sidebar.deleteConfirmText: Are you sure you want to delete {name} ({email})? All local data for this account will be removed.
sidebar.pop3LimitedFeatures: POP3 only supports inbox and starred, operations are local only

mailList.noSearchResultsHint: Try a different keyword or clear the search.
mailList.emptyFolder: This folder is empty for now.

reader.noMatchingMessageHint: The current search did not match any cached messages in this folder.
reader.noMessageSelectedHint: This folder is empty or no message is currently selected.
reader.selectMessageHint: Choose a message from the list to start reading.
reader.imagesBlocked: Some images in this email have been blocked.

composer.subject: Subject
composer.dropAttachments: Drag files here to add attachments
composer.dropAttachmentsHint: You can also keep using the Attach button.

status.serverSavedWithLocalChanges: Local changes not saved to server

recovery.title: Unsaved draft found
recovery.message: You have an unsaved draft from a previous session. Would you like to restore it or start fresh?
recovery.existingMessage: This draft has newer local edits than the copy saved in Drafts. Do you want to restore the local version or open the saved version?

closePrompt.title: When closing MailYou
closePrompt.description: Choose what to do when the window closes. Minimize will hide MailYou to the tray and keep syncing mail and notifications.

settings.title: Settings
settings.launchOnStartupDescription: Start MailYou automatically after you sign in. Supported on Windows and Linux.
settings.accountQuotaUnavailable: This mailbox does not expose storage quota details.
settings.recoveryBackupsDescription: MailYou automatically exports snapshots of account configuration, drafts, and contacts so you can restore data that cannot be fully rebuilt from the server after local encrypted storage is reset.
settings.recoveryBackupsSummary: {count} recovery snapshots are currently available. The latest export was created at {latest}.
settings.recoveryBackupsEmpty: No recovery snapshots are available yet.
settings.recoveryBackupsUnavailable: Recovery backup status is currently unavailable.

security.title: Encrypted storage
security.keyringUnavailableDescription: MailYou cannot currently use the system keyring on this device to store the local encryption key. You can set a master password, or review the system credential manager when convenient.
security.keyringUnavailableSummary: The system keyring is currently unavailable. You can set a master password, or repair the credential manager later before continuing to use encrypted local storage.
security.keyringOnlySummary: Local encrypted data is currently protected by the system keyring. If you want an additional recovery path when the device state or keyring changes, you can also set a master password.
security.keyringOnlyWithRecoverySummary: Local encrypted data is currently protected mainly by the system keyring, with a local recovery backup available as an additional fallback. You can also set a master password if you want a more stable recovery path.
security.masterPasswordRecommended: Your local data currently depends mainly on the system keyring. If recoverability matters to you, you can consider setting a master password.
security.masterPasswordRecommendedWithRecovery: A local recovery backup is already available and may help in some cases. If you want a more complete recovery setup, you can consider setting a master password.
security.missingStorageKeyTitle: The local encryption key is missing
security.missingStorageKeyDescription: MailYou detected that the system keyring entry previously used to decrypt local data is no longer available on this device, so existing accounts, cached mail, and contacts can no longer be read.
security.missingStorageKeyDetail: If no master password was configured earlier, this encrypted local data is usually difficult to recover directly. You can try restoring the system keyring entry, or recover what is available from automatic backups. If needed, you can also add the mail accounts again.
security.recoveryRestoreAvailable: {count} recovery snapshots are available. You can try rebuilding account settings, drafts, and contacts from the latest snapshot first.
security.restoreLatestRecoveryFailed: Failed to rebuild local data from the recovery snapshot.
security.unlockDescription: This device is using an optional master password. Enter it to unlock accounts, mail, and contacts stored locally.
security.enabledSummary: A master password is required after app restart before local mail data can be read.
security.disabledSummary: No master password is configured. Local encryption relies on the system keyring only.
security.optionalHint: This is optional. If enabled, MailYou will ask for the password on next launch before loading local data.
security.passwordMismatch: Passwords must match and be at least 8 characters long.
security.updateFailed: Failed to update the master password.
security.disableFailed: Failed to remove the master password.
security.lockFailed: Failed to lock the current session.

accountSetup.subtitle: Connect a new mailbox
accountSetup.title: Account setup
accountSetup.heading: Connect a new mailbox
accountSetup.emailHint: Enter your email first. MailYou will detect the provider and sign-in method.
accountSetup.enterValidEmail: Enter a valid email address to continue.
accountSetup.oauthProviderHint: OAuth opens in your browser. Authorize, test, then save.
accountSetup.oauthDirectUnavailable: Local client credentials are not configured for this provider.
accountSetup.customProviderSummary: No preset found. Please fill in the server fields below.
accountSetup.serverPresetApplied: Using built-in server settings. Turn on advanced mode to edit them.
accountSetup.oauthManualCallbackHint: If the browser did not return to MailYou automatically, paste the full callback URL here to continue sign-in.
accountSetup.oauthManualCallbackRejected: This callback URL does not match the current sign-in flow. Make sure you are using the URL returned by the authorization you just completed.
accountSetup.identitiesHint: Configure aliases, reply-to addresses, and signatures for this mailbox.

shell.confirmDeleteText: Are you sure you want to delete this message? It will be moved to Trash.

shell.chooseAccountHint: Choose an account to load its mailbox
shell.failedToLoadMailbox: Failed to load mailbox. Please try again.
shell.failedToLoadMessages: Failed to load messages. Please try again.

labels.manageHint: Add, remove, or organize labels for this message.
labels.deleteConfirm: Delete label "{label}"? It will be removed from all messages in this account.
